title: VCalPoints
description: VCalPoints enables you to teach points for a vision calibration from a SPEL+ program.
notes: The calibration definition must be set up from the Vision Guide window or created using VCreateCalibration before a calibration will run.  Also, the calibration points must already be taught, or you can use a point file in the Controller with the same name as the calibration that has the point data required for calibration.  If Epson RC+ sees this point file, it will use the points in the file.  See the following
examples:
Integer status

VCalPoints "mycal", status
If status =1 Then VCal "mycal" VSave
EndIf
